patch_description: Introduce a hexagonal lattice initialisation to improve initial center packing density, and add a lightweight second-start annealing pass to diversify the search and escape local optima. The hex-grid is generated locally around the square center using a triangular lattice basis, ensuring no overlaps near walls and better space-filling than two fixed rings. A second independent restart (with a different RNG seed) refines the arrangement further, potentially increasing the total sum of radii beyond prior runs. These changes are designed to be incremental and self-contained, preserving the existing interface while likely boosting performance without relying on external libraries.
